name: Together AI
description: Together AI provides a fast inference platform for running open-source large language models, embedding models, image generation models, and reranking models. It offers an OpenAI-compatible API for chat completions, text completions, embeddings, image generation, reranking, fine-tuning, file management, and model listing at competitive pricing.

capabilities.name: chat_completions_create
capabilities.description: Generate a chat completion response given a conversation history of messages. Supports all open-source chat models with streaming, tool calling, JSON mode, and reasoning.

capabilities.name: completions_create
capabilities.description: Generate text completions for a given prompt string using language, code, or image models.

capabilities.name: embeddings_create
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for one or more text inputs. Useful for semantic search, clustering, and RAG workflows.

capabilities.name: images_create
capabilities.description: Generate images from text prompts using open-source diffusion models like FLUX and Stable Diffusion.

capabilities.name: rerank_create
capabilities.description: Rerank a list of documents by relevance to a query. Returns relevance scores and ordering for each document.

capabilities.name: models_list
capabilities.description: List all available open-source models on the Together AI platform with type, context length, and pricing information.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_create
capabilities.description: Create a fine-tuning job to train a custom model on your dataset. Supports LoRA and full fine-tuning.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_list
capabilities.description: List the metadata for all fine-tuning jobs associated with your account.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the metadata for a single fine-tuning job by its ID.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_events_list
capabilities.description: List the training events and progress for a specific fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel a currently running fine-tuning job.

capabilities.name: fine_tunes_download
capabilities.description: Download a compressed fine-tuned model or checkpoint as a binary file.

capabilities.name: files_upload
capabilities.description: Upload a file for fine-tuning, evaluation, or batch processing.

capabilities.name: files_list
capabilities.description: List the metadata for all uploaded data files.

capabilities.name: files_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the metadata for a single uploaded data file by its ID.

capabilities.name: files_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a previously uploaded data file.
